providers.description: Apple Speech routed through a lightweight macOS agent.

notes: Install the provider explicitly so it becomes discoverable on the gateway.
A connected apple_agent is still required before traffic can flow.

providers.description: SenseVoice behind a remote bridge or model-serving sidecar.

notes: Download model artifacts during the install workflow instead of at gateway boot.
Start the provider bridge separately and point the gateway at it through TCP.

providers.description: Paraformer streaming ASR reachable over the bridge TCP protocol.

notes: Install does not auto-start the provider service.
Provision weights and bring up the bridge before sending traffic.

providers.description: MiniMax cloud ASR routed through the gateway over its HTTP transcription API.

notes: Set MINIMAX_API_KEY in the gateway environment or provide api_key_file in state before enabling traffic.
